positive: A stylized, minimal abstract representation of a majestic mountain range at sunset. The mountains should feature sharp, clean geometric silhouettes against a vibrant gradient sky of deep indigo, fiery orange, and pale lavender. Incorporate simplified, bold celestial elements like crescent moons and stylized constellations. Composition must be centered and balanced, ideal for repeating fabric prints. The style should be modern vector art mixed with watercolor wash effects, maintaining high contrast and print-readiness. Perfect contrast, highly detailed background texture, volumetric lighting.
